steps.name: dashboard-page
steps.summary: Implemented /dashboard Server Component with patient header, today's events feed, quick stats, and spending rules sections following UI_GUIDE.md.

steps.name: onboarding-page
steps.summary: Implemented 4-step onboarding page (POA confirmation, patient info, medication schedule, spending rules) and POST /api/onboarding route that upserts patient, prescription, and spending_rules in Supabase.

steps.name: realtime-events
steps.summary: Extracted events feed into EventsFeed client component with Supabase Realtime subscription for INSERT/UPDATE; initial events passed as prop from Server Component.

steps.name: health-check-cron
steps.summary: Added 60s heartbeat writes from WebcamCapture to POST /api/health/heartbeat; GET /api/cron/health-check alerts caretaker for stale cams; System Status card on dashboard shows each cam's last heartbeat and online/offline pill.

steps.name: smoke-e2e
steps.summary: Typecheck, all 35 tests, and production build pass; demos/phase-3-smoke.md created with full demo checklist results.
